summary: Comprehensive testing of BISD HUB iteration 5 completed. All new features working correctly: FriendsPage with tabs and search, logo integration across all pages, Admin Edit User dialog, Action Logs tab with search in both Admin and Moderation panels, Settings page friends separation with shortcut button. Backend APIs 100% pass rate (20/20 tests). Frontend UI and navigation 100% functional.
passed_tests: Login with ADMIN001/admin123 - redirects to main app
Login with USER001/user123 - regular user access works
Login with MOD001/mod123 - moderator access works
Login page logo displays correctly (/bisdhub-logo.png)
Main App sidebar logo displays correctly
Mobile header logo displays correctly
Admin Panel logo displays correctly
Friends nav button in sidebar works
Friends page (/friends) accessible and loads correctly
Friends page has 'Friends' tab with count
Friends page has 'Requests' tab with count
Friends page search input works
Friends page back button works
Settings page has 'Manage Friends & Requests' button
Settings page button navigates to /friends
Settings page friends sections correctly separated (only shortcut remains)
Admin Panel Users tab has Edit button for each user
Admin Panel Edit User dialog opens with all fields (Display Name, Full Name, Email, Class, Section, Bio)
Admin Panel Edit User dialog has Save Changes button
Admin Panel Action Logs tab exists
Admin Panel Action Logs search input works
Admin Panel Action Logs search filters results correctly
Moderation Panel Action Logs tab exists
Moderation Panel Action Logs search input works
WebSocket connection establishes and shows 'Connected' status
Post feed loads correctly with timestamps (e.g., '3h ago')
Post feed shows serial numbers in post metadata
Feed tabs (Official, Public, Following, Friends) all work
Navigation: Home, Global Chat, Messages, Friends, Profile, Settings all work
Navigation: Admin Panel, Moderation Panel work for authorized users
Regular user correctly cannot see Admin/Moderation panels
Global Chat reply feature implemented (replyingTo state, reply_to payload)
Global Chat emoji reactions implemented (sendReaction, QUICK_EMOJIS)
Global Chat report feature implemented (reportChatMessage, report button)
Backend: Friends list endpoint (/friends/list) works
Backend: Friend requests endpoint (/friends/requests) works
Backend: Admin users endpoint (/admin/users) works
Backend: Admin edit user endpoint (/admin/users/{id}/edit) works
Backend: Action logs endpoint (/management/action-logs) works
Backend: Action logs search parameter works
Backend: Chat report endpoint (/chat/report) exists
Backend: Chat rooms endpoint (/chat/rooms) works
Backend: Chat messages endpoint (/chat/{room}/messages) works
seed_data_creation: Test messages sent during chat testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 3 features are working correctly. FriendsPage is a new dedicated page at /friends with Friends and Requests tabs plus search functionality. Settings page now has a 'Manage Friends & Requests' shortcut button instead of inline friend management. Logo (bisdhub-logo.png) displays on Login page, MainApp sidebar, Mobile header, and Admin Panel. Global Chat has reply/reaction/report features implemented but chat messages expire after 24 hours so the chat area may appear empty. Admin Panel has Edit User dialog with all required fields and Action Logs tab with search. Moderation Panel also has Action Logs tab with search. All navigation works correctly. WebSocket connects and shows 'Connected' status.
